zh.lifeSummary: 當William Keith 1st Earl Marischal於1425年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾斯同哈文時，他的父親Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland36歲，母親Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow30歲。他於1448年4月26日與Margaret Erskine在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年12月10日在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾斯同哈文享年58歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Keith 1st Earl Marischal于1425年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾斯同哈文时，他的父亲Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland36岁，母亲Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow30岁。他于1448年4月26日与Margaret Erskine在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年12月10日在英国苏格兰金加迪爾斯同哈文享年58岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Keith 1st Earl Marischal was born in 1425, in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, was 36 and his mother, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, was 30. He married Margaret Erskine on 26 April 1448, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 10 December 1483, in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Keith 1st Earl Marischal est né en 1425, à Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Erskine le 26 avril 1448, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1483, à Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Keith 1st Earl Marischal 1425 in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 36 und seine Mutter Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow 30. Er hat am 26. April 1448 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1483 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Keith 1st Earl Marischal è nato il nel 1425 nel Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Erskine il 26 aprile 1448, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 10 dicembre 1483, nel Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Keith 1st Earl Marischalが1425年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアストーネヘイベンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandは36歳，母Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzowは30歳であった。1448年4月26日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでMargaret Erskineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年12月10日にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアストーネヘイベンで58歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Keith 1st Earl Marischal(이)가 1425년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 스톤하븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1448년 4월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Margaret Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 12월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 스톤하븐에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Keith 1st Earl Marischal nasceu em 1425, em Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Erskine em 26 de abril de 1448, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1483, em Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Keith 1st Earl Marischal родился в 1425 г. в местности стоунэавен, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Erskine 26 апреля 1448 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 10 декабря 1483 г. в местности стоунэавен, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Keith 1st Earl Marischal nació en 1425, en Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William de Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mary - Mariota Hamilton of Cadzow, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Erskine el 26 de abril de 1448, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1483, en Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
